ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parks" (
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each park */,
  "park_name" TEXT /* Name of the park */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the park */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the park is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the park is located */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the park was established */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the park in square kilometers */,
  "annual_visitors" INTEGER /* Average number of visitors per year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the visitor (1-5 scale) */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the review is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the reviewer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the reviewer (M/F) */,
  "relationship_status" TEXT /* Relationship status of the reviewer (Married/Single) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the reviewer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the reviewer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the reviewer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the activity entails */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the activity in hours */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the activity (e.g., Easy, Moderate, Difficult) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_details" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit record */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review associated with the visit */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity participated in */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback given during the visit */,
  "hours_spent" REAL /* Number of hours spent in the park during the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_details_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_details_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_details_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_details_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES visitor_feedback ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aggregate_reviews" (
  "aggregate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for aggregated data */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews received */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating calculated from all reviews */,
  "num_positive_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of positive reviews (rating >= 4) */,
  "num_negative_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of negative reviews (rating < 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aggregate_reviews_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for review statistics */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park */,
  "male_count" INTEGER /* Count of reviews submitted by male visitors */,
  "female_count" INTEGER /* Count of reviews submitted by female visitors */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total count of reviews submitted */,
  "age_group_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column storing the distribution of reviews by age groups */,
  "occupation_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column storing the distribution of reviews by occupations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_statistics_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitors" (
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visitor */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the visitor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the visitor (M/F) */,
  "relationship_status" TEXT /* Relationship status of the visitor (Married/Single) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the visitor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the visitor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the visitor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the visitor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the visitor */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the visitor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitor_activity" (
  "visitor_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visitor's activity record */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor participating in the activity */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity participated in */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity participation */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the activity participation in hours */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback given for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visitor_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitor_activity_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitor_activity_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES visitor_feedback ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitor_activity_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review to which the comment belongs */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who made the comment */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the comment is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park visited */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "hours_spent" REAL /* Number of hours spent in the park during the visit */,
  "num_activities" INTEGER /* Number of activities participated in during the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_visits_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_visits_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitor_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park for which feedback is given */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the feedback is anonymous */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., General, Suggestion, Complaint) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitor_feedback_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitor_feedback_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id")
)
